hm-ai-strapi-translate.plugin.name: HM AI Strapi Translate
hm-ai-strapi-translate.plugin.page.descr: Configure the HM AI Strapi Translate plugin settings. Be aware that Base Model, API Key and LLM Base URL need to be set as environment variables.
Base URL for the LLM API. It needs to be set as an environment variable.
Model that will be used to generate the translations. It needs to be set as an environment variable.
A higher value will make the output more random, while a lower value will make it more focused and deterministic.
This is (part) of the prompt that will be used to instruct the LLM. It should be clear and concise.
hm-ai-strapi-translate.plugin.page.title: HM AI Strapi Translate (Configuration)
